title: Battery Energy Stationary Storage Insights | Benchmark Mineral Intelligence
author: @benchmarkmin
text:
Battery Energy Stationary StorageOverviewBattery Energy Stationary Storage (BESS)Accelerate the energy storage boom with accurate market dataAccess granular data and analysis on battery energy stationary storage systems, from long-term BESS forecasts to system pricing, capacity growth trends and deployment databases.Get in touch to learn moreContact Us Download Brochure Why do companies trust Benchmark’s BESS Service? As the world pursues net zero targets, a key challenge is clear - how to store and deliver renewable energy efficiently, at a scale that meets demand.Benchmark provides comprehensive visibility into the battery energy storage system (BESS) market, enabling supply chain participants to navigate the fast-moving sector with confidence and commercial success.Learn more about our BESS Service: Book a Demo Expertise Benchmark conducts BESS research through contact with our exclusive global supply chain network developed over 10+ years of specialising in the battery supply chain.
Trusted Our insights are called upon by the world’s leading decision-makers, including the US Senate, the UK Parliament, and the Canadian House of Commons.
Coverage We are proud to offer the greatest depth and breadth of intelligence across energy transition supply chains, from mine to grid.
Guidance Comprehensive data is enriched by year-round access to our BESS analysts, ensuring bespoke support for your specific objectives.What is included in Benchmark’s BESS Service?Battery Energy Stationary Storage ForecastA quarterly strategic forecast that decodes the future of battery storage through regional and application-based demand projections, chemistry-level analysis, system pricing forecasts and cell manufacturer tracking.
Battery Energy Stationary Storage DatabaseA data-first tool for dynamic visibility and real-time tracking of global grid-scale BESS projects, broken down by 30 key metrics.Battery Energy Stationary Storage AssessmentA monthly pulse on BESS market developments, including the latest project announcements, commissioning updates, capacity pipeline, and demand breakdowns.

Download Brochure Who can benefit from the BESS Service?Raw material suppliers and cell manufacturers Our fundamental demand forecast updates mean that you have up-to-date visibility on the latest forward view of the market.Project developers and system integrators Supply chain mapping to keep you updated on partnerships in the BESS industry and how competitors are positioning themselves.Utility and energy buyers Our system pricing forecast provides a forward view of BESS CAPEX costs with customisable features to tailor to your needs.Policy-makers and analysts We are transparent about the provenance of our data so that strategic policy decisions can be held up to the highest levels of governmental scrutiny.Investors Evaluate risk through supply chain, legislation, price forecasts and growth projections.Book a Demo Complete Your Battery Demand CoverageSubscribers to Benchmark's EV & Battery and BESS Services automatically unlock Benchmark's comprehensive Battery Demand report. Enrich your picture of battery demand applications with additional analysis.Contact Us Need a more bespoke approach? Benchmark Mineral Intelligence delivers bespoke consultancy solutions, empowering your business to address complex commercial decisions including:AcquisitionsDivestituresExpansions of operationsCompany sustainability strategyLife-cycle assessmentsExpert witness servicesLeverage Benchmark's deep industry knowledge to guide tailored project execution to drive your business Can’t find an answer?Contact Us What is covered in the BESS ServiceWhat is the forecast report frequency?The report is an annual subscription which includes:A quarterly forecast with a comprehensive summary and evaluation of the present and future BESS marketA monthly assessment with update of global BESS developments both for projects and news from the sectorA monthly database providing a project-by-project status update of grid scale stationary storage projectsHow is the forecast report delivered?What is the research methodology?Looking for key market updates?
